---
title: "Home"
---

This is the English edition of the bilingual online book on statistical analysis.
Each theory chapter is paired with a companion notebook so the narrative and the
numerical side stay close to each other.

## Project layout

- theory chapters live in `en/chapters/`;
- notebooks live in `en/notebooks/`;
- shared styles, bibliography, and PDF settings live in `shared/`;
- the Russian edition is built in parallel from `ru/`.

Start here: [Probability and Moments](chapters/probability.qmd).
